name: rich-cli-kit
absorption_note: 2-crate Rust workspace absorbed as phenotype-tooling/crates/rck-{core,cli}. rck-core (44 tests pass) provides capability detection + kitty-graphics encoder + OSC 8/52/133 wrappers + interactive primitives; rck-cli provides the `rck` binary with 13 subcommands (detect | image | progress | panel | link | copy | task-start | task-end | ask | pick | input | shader | demo). 3 GLSL shaders staged at repo root per include_str!("../../../shaders/...") path. docs/ + shaders/ provenance mirror kept under phenotype-tooling/absorption/rich-cli-kit/. Source repo archived via gh repo archive KooshaPari/rich-cli-kit -y.
note: Source repo: KooshaPari/rich-cli-kit (Rust workspace, 14MB). Port spec: phenotype-tooling/docs/absorption/RCK_PORT.md. Provenance: phenotype-tooling/absorption/rich-cli-kit/README.md. Original mcp/rich_cli_mcp/ Python MCP server deferred (out of scope).
